name: deploy-concept-audit-lifecycle
tags: deploy, concept store, concept audit, invariants, contracts, lifecycle, pre-merge
body:
The concept audit step during /deploy is working well and should be kept as-is.

During deploy, diff changed .py files against concept_store/concepts.json, surface matching concept invariants/contracts, and update stale concepts in-place before merging to test.

**Why:** Catches stale invariants before they ship (e.g. VALID_DOMAINS removal invalidated a config-db-paths-and-domains invariant). The update-in-place flow (patch concepts.json, commit to dev with same task:<id>, then proceed with deploy) is the right cadence.

**How to apply:** During /deploy Step 1, always run the concept audit even for large diffs. Update stale concepts immediately — do not defer. Commit the concept update to dev before merging to test.
